channel.title: Centameta Blog
channel.description: Notes on intelligent systems, embedded development, analytics, and AI engineering.

item.title: Essential Nix commands for Rust projects
item.description: A concise guide to nix develop, nix shell, nix run, and nix build for Rust projects.

item.title: Rust struct types — regular, tuple, and unit
item.description: Named fields, tuple structs, and unit structs, with type-safety takeaways for systems code.

item.title: Rust error handling: Option and Result
item.description: How Option and Result make missing values and recoverable failures explicit in Rust.

item.title: Features and Use Cases of Hermes Agent
item.description: A practical look at features and use cases of Hermes Agent across local development, messaging workflows, scheduling, and browser automation.
